expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: SKILL.md, README.md, reference.md, and AGENTS docs stay aligned
expectations.evidence: The output explicitly covers SKILL.md/README.md/reference.md alignment, but cannot cover AGENTS docs alignment: result.md states “AGENTS docs (not present in provided evidence)” and “Status: Cannot verify (BLOCKER) … no AGENTS* files … included in the provided evidence.” Therefore the full case focus (including AGENTS) is not explicitly covered/verified.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase docs
expectations.evidence: The primary phase/checkpoint under test is “docs” and the deliverable is a docs sync review. result.md states “Primary phase/checkpoint under test: docs.” and provides an evidence-based alignment review across the specified docs, which is consistent with a docs-phase output.
